uid.description: The unique identifier of the VoiceCallSetting entity (e.g., "56ah3478b56c")

business_uid.description: The unique identifier of the business (e.g., "d290f1ee-6c54-4b01-90e6-d701748f0851")

staff_uid.description: The unique identifier of the staff receiving the forwarded call (e.g., "5ya4gbwm2c3qic8")

forward_number.description: The phone number of the staff receiving the forwarded call (e.g., "180348567634")

dedicated_number.description: The dedicated number of the business receiving calls from clients (e.g., "12845783457")

forwarding_enabled.description: Indicates if voice call forwarding is enabled (e.g., true)

call_forwarding_policy.description: Specifies the conditions under which calls are forwarded based on staff availability (e.g., "WORK_HOURS")

publish_number.description: Indicates if the dedicated number should be published as the business's phone number (e.g., true)

voice_scripts.description: Configuration of voice messages played to callers during different stages of a voice call. Each key is a message name, value is an object with message (string) and enabled (boolean).

external_app_name.description: The name of the external application managing the voice call (e.g., "my.pa")

feature.description: The feature type for this setting (e.g., "VOICE")

transcript_enabled.description: Whether automatic transcript processing is enabled for voice calls in this business (e.g., true)

greeting_message.message: Hi, The call will be forwarded soon, please wait.

voicemail_message.message: Sorry, the staff is not available right now. Please leave a message after the beep.

recording_call_message.message: Please note that this is a voice recording, please press 1 to continue.

description: Defines voice call settings for a staff member/business, including forwarding, policies, and scripts.
